title: Protecting the Natural Environment
description: For questions 17 – 24, read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line. There is an example at the beginning (0).

content.text: (0) Environmental damage caused by human activity is now one of the most serious issues facing the planet. Air and water (17) pollution affects millions of people and countless species worldwide. The burning of fossil fuels releases gases that are deeply (18) harmful to the atmosphere, contributing to climate change. Many animal and plant species are now (19) threatened as their natural habitats are destroyed. Forests and oceans play a vital role in maintaining (20) natural balance and biodiversity. Moving towards (21) sustainable sources of energy is essential to reduce our carbon footprint. (22) Careless disposal of waste products continues to damage both land and sea. Greater (23) protection of national parks and marine areas is needed urgently. The (24) industrial sector must adopt greener practices if future generations are to enjoy a healthy planet.

example.text: (0) ENVIRONMENTAL damage caused by human activity is now one of the most serious issues facing the planet. (ENVIRONMENT)

questions.explanation: A noun is needed after 'Air and water'; 'pollute' becomes 'pollution' by adding the suffix '-ion'.
An adjective is needed after 'deeply'; 'harm' becomes 'harmful' by adding the suffix '-ful'.
An adjective is needed after 'now'; 'threat' becomes 'threaten' then 'threatened', meaning 'at risk of harm or extinction'.
An adjective is needed before 'balance'; 'nature' becomes 'natural' by adding the suffix '-al'.
An adjective is needed before 'sources'; 'sustain' becomes 'sustainable' by adding the suffix '-able'.
An adjective is needed at the start of the sentence; 'care' becomes 'careless' by adding the suffix '-less' to mean 'without care'.
A noun is needed after 'Greater'; 'protect' becomes 'protection' by adding the suffix '-ion'.
An adjective is needed before 'sector'; 'industry' becomes 'industrial' by adding the suffix '-ial'.
